faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Middle Village?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Middle Village typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Middle Village home?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Middle Village homes take 4-6 hours for initial service, with heat treatments often completed in a single day. Chemical treatments may require follow-up visits 10-14 days later to eliminate newly hatched eggs and ensure complete eradication.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Middle Village?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are completely safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We use EPA-approved products and provide clear instructions for preparation and re-entry times, typically allowing you to return home within a few hours of treatment.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee bed bug elimination in Middle Village?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC stands behind our bed bug treatments with a comprehensive warranty. If bed bugs return within the guarantee period, we'll re-treat your Middle Village property at no additional charge. We also provide prevention tips to help keep your home protected long-term.
